subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Render praise unto the Desire of all worlds, Who hath favored thee with a son that hath turned his face unto the Most Exalted Horizon and hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله حمد کن مقصود عالمیان را ترا فائز فرمود بابنیکه بافق اعلی توجه نمود و فائز شد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
